mapper.select: SELECT la.id, la.leave_no AS leaveNo, la.emp_id AS empId, e.name AS empName, la.leave_type AS leaveType, la.start_date AS startDate, la.end_date AS endDate, la.days AS days, la.reason AS reason, la.status AS status, la.create_time AS createTime FROM leave_application la LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON la.emp_id = e.id WHERE la.emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY la.create_time DESC
